restrictions: Never perform ABAP edit/check/activate on SAP_QA or SAP_PRD.
Never perform an action for another agent.
Never reuse confirmation for a different object or action.
Save every changed ABAP object as Local Object ($TMP).
Cancel the action if SAP requests, assigns, or would create a transport Request or CR.
Never create, assign, release, or transport a Request or CR.
Preflight and post-verify authoritative SAP object state before reporting a repository change as successful.
Business-data transactions on any enabled server still require explicit one-time confirmation through the SAP action confirmation guard.
Always record the confirmed action, target object, server, timestamp, and result in the audit trail.
